series_metadata.series_title: Property Inventory Record - Land, Buildings, and Equipment
series_metadata.series_description: A) The purpose of this file is to provide information concerning purchased property for the Department. B) The file contains such information as description of property and equipment, serial number, property number, original cost, date aquired, etc. Additions and deletions are provided annually to the Auditor of State by December 15th of the following fiscal year.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 5 years after audit, providing audit by State Auditor is completed; then destroy, Paper: Wastepaper
